No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to hunger or food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to health and well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course is tertiary education (Target 4.3) and explicitly aims to develop understanding of 'sustainability issues' (Target 4.7). It also fosters 'team work and leadership' and 'problem solving' skills (Target 4.4).

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course focuses on 'Strategic Marketing Analysis' and its 'impact and importance for business operations,' including 'global marketing management,' directly supporting economic growth and preparing students for productive employment (Targets 8.2, 8.3).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course covers 'internet marketing,' linking to ICT infrastructure (Target 9.c). Strategic marketing analysis inherently supports industrial innovation and competitiveness (Target 9.5).

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to reducing inequalities.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to sustainable cities or communities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The core competence 'To understand and identify ethical, socially responsible, and sustainability issues' directly supports encouraging companies to adopt sustainable practices (Target 12.6).

Climate Action.reason: While 'sustainability issues' is mentioned, there is no specific evidence linking the course content to climate change mitigation or adaptation.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to marine ecosystems.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to terrestrial ecosystems.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The explicit mention of 'Respect Copyright' (維護智慧財產權) aligns with promoting the rule of law (Target 16.3). Understanding 'ethical issues' can also relate to anti-corruption (Target 16.5).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: Course topics like 'global marketing management' and '通路協調 (channel coordination)' inherently involve partnerships and cooperation, aligning with multi-stakeholder partnerships (Target 17.16) and the multilateral trading system (Target 17.10).
